DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS DALT HOTEL AND TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF OTYANG SHALL PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO THE FORM INTERROGATORIES AND RFPS WITHIN ONE WEEK OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $500 ARE DUE AND PAYABLE TO DEFENDANT IF VERIFIED FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES ARE NOT RECEIVED WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI: J. RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (DISC302)

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. 1. THE CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF VINCENT OTYANG AGAINST DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION IS DENIED; AND, 2. PLAINTIFF VINCENT OTYANG AND DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION SHALL EACH BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition; Request For Sanctions [Discovery]
Off Calendar Nov-08-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vincent Otyang 415-225-5752 Plaintiff/ opposing party in Pro Per.
Nicole Jones, Esq. 415-362-2580 of Lewis Brisbois for Defendant/Moving party.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DALT HOTEL, TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition; Request For Sanctions.

Defendant's motion to compel is granted. Plaintiff shall appear for his deposition on November 10, 2017 at 10:00 am at TNDC Corporate Office with his photographs and if Plaintiff complies with this order sanctions will not be issued. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Respond To Discovery; Request For Sanctions [Discovery]
Off Calendar Nov-01-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Nicole L. Jones of the law offices of Lewis Brisbois (415-438-6663) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

Stipulation and order appointing judge pro tem is signed and filed.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS DALT HOTEL and TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Respond To Discovery; Request For Sanctions is GRANTED. Plaintiff Otyang shall provide verified responses to the Form Interrogatories and RFPs within one week of notice of this order. Sanctions in the amount of $500 are due and payable to defendant if verified full and complete responses are not received within 10 days of notice of this order. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (DISC302)
